tree.name: Miles Bridges
tree.tradeDescription: Clippers drafted Bridges 12th overall and traded him with two future 2nd-round picks to Hornets for Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (11th pick)
tree.note: Michigan State forward, athletic versatile player. Re-signed with Charlotte Jul 2, 2023 and Jul 14, 2024.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2018 1st Round Pick (#11)
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own 11th overall pick, sent to Clippers in draft-night swap for Bridges
